title: Mobism
description: All mobs are mobist against you
body:
# The minecraft world is tired of you ruling them. They all have some sort of grudge against you.

**Animals will subtlety talk about you.**
![A sheep being awfully mobist against you](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14c2d2b1dc2f5100a54c48d52ced073cfcef5a67.png)

**Some villagers don't want to trade with you.**
![A mason not wanting to trade with you.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1ac8b1cb1bd8955c7d0198004d7bd3a0591b5b9.png)

**And if they do, they are making sure they get the most out of you.**
![Unfair prices for just me.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3229cde873410f6e084ef9e419e4a87fb53f2ebb_0.webp)
